name: Community Admin
description: Delegated organizer user management for invite-only Mattermost communities.

settings_schema.header: Configure delegated organizers who can create and manage users within assigned teams and channels.
settings_schema.footer: Only system administrators can edit this configuration. User IDs are authoritative; usernames are display-only.

settings.help_text: JSON allowlist mapping organizer user IDs to teams, channels, and permissions.
